side_effects.description: Anaphylactic-type reaction: collapsed to the floor, loss of consciousness, vomiting, near-defecation, blacked out multiple times, heart racing, entire body red, sweating, alternating hot and shivering, unable to stand
Twisted knee from collapse, required months of rehabilitation

protocol_notes: 15 years of peptide experience; this was a first occurrence of such a reaction. Managed to swallow two Benadryl before first blackout when hands got itchy, which may have saved their life. Now informs spouse before taking any new peptide and keeps EpiPen and antihistamines nearby.
